message:
beads: sync session closures (crkft epic closed, arch-int partial)

Final state after the 3-epic architectural sprint:

Closed this session (18 beads):
- crkft epic: 5 children closed (audit, flip, tests, floor, docs)
  + crkft parent epic itself
- 8n0rm epic: 5 children closed (inventory, ADR, AuthClaims, crypto
  refactor, schema_version, conformance) — parent stays OPEN pending
  8n0rm.6 + 8n0rm.8
- jkcka epic: 6 children closed (audit, ADR, typestate split,
  migration-prep, handoff E2E, trybuild, docs) — parent stays OPEN
  pending jkcka.8

Filed as follow-up (honest deferrals):
- 8n0rm.6 — remove legacy GRANTS/OPERATIONS fallback (blocked by .8)
- 8n0rm.8 — migrate OPERATIONS-emitting callers in fcp-host +
  connectors
- jkcka.8 — full workspace CryptographicallyVerified → Bound/Unbound
  migration + legacy verify() deletion

arch-int closed with --force flag acknowledging the 3 deferred
follow-ups; its integration verification work (38 regression tests
green across 5 crates) completed successfully for the shipped
primitives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
